metadata.title: BusinessDNA — Find and build the business that fits you
metadata.description: AI-powered guidance to discover, validate and launch the business that matches your personality, skills and goals.

common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sidebar.upgradeDescription: Unlock unlimited blueprints and your AI Co-Founder.

hero.title: Your future business starts with the right plan.
hero.subtitle: Personalized business matches, AI-generated plans and step-by-step guidance — built around who you actually are.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From personality to launch, in four guided steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us about your skills, goals, budget and lifestyle.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See compatibility scores across dozens of real business models.
howItWorks.step3Desc: A full business plan, financial model and brand direction — generated for you.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Work through a month-by-month plan with your AI Co-Founder.

features.title: Everything you need to go from idea to launch
features.item1Desc: Matches are based on how you actually work, not generic trends.
features.item2Desc: Executive summary, market analysis, SWOT and financial forecast.
features.item3Desc: A daily thinking partner for decisions, not just documents.
features.item4Desc: Month-by-month milestones so you always know the next step.

journey.title: Your journey
journey.subtitle: One guided path from uncertainty to launch day.

testimonials.title: Built for people building something real

t1.quote: The blueprint gave me a real starting point instead of a blank page.
t1.name: Andrei P.

t2.quote: I finally had a plan that matched how I actually want to work.
t2.name: Maria I.

t3.quote: The roadmap kept me moving instead of stuck in research mode.
t3.name: Radu V.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to launch.
pricing.proDesc: Full blueprints, roadmaps and your AI Co-Founder.

q1.question: Do I need a business idea to start?
q1.answer: No — most people start with the assessment and let BusinessDNA suggest matches based on their profile.

q2.question: What languages are supported?
q2.answer: The app and every generated document are available in English and Romanian, with more languages planned.

q3.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q3.answer: Yes, subscriptions are month-to-month with no long-term commitment.

q4.question: Is my data kept private?
q4.answer: Your assessment answers and business data are never shared or sold to third parties.

cta.title: Find the business that fits you.
cta.subtitle: It takes about ten minutes to get your first matches.

footer.tagline: The business that fits you, built step by step.

todaysMission.title: Today's mission
todaysMission.empty: No tasks yet — generate a roadmap to see your next steps here.

recentActivity.title: Recent activity
recentActivity.empty: Nothing yet. Your activity will show up here.

intro.title: Let's get to know you.
intro.subtitle: Eight short sections, one question at a time. Answer honestly — there are no wrong answers, only better matches.

validation.required: This one needs an answer before you continue.

review.title: Let's review your answers.
review.subtitle: Everything here is editable — tap any section to change your answer.

reveal.title: Your Entrepreneur DNA
reveal.subtitle: We've analyzed thousands of data points from your answers.

hero.summary: Based on your answers so far, you show strong alignment with {archetype} traits — comfort with ambiguity, a pull toward new ideas, and a bias for bold moves over safe ones.

systemsBuilder.title: Systems Builder
systemsBuilder.description: You turn ideas into processes that keep running without you in the room.
systemsBuilder.summary: You think in workflows and checklists more than grand gestures — your edge comes from building things that hold up under repetition, not just from a single good idea.

visionaryOperator.title: Visionary Operator
visionaryOperator.description: You pair a long view of where things are headed with the discipline to actually run the day-to-day.
visionaryOperator.summary: You're rare in combining big-picture thinking with operational follow-through — you can set the direction and still show up to execute it.

creativeStrategist.title: Creative Strategist
creativeStrategist.description: You lead with original ideas, then work backward into a plan that makes them real.
creativeStrategist.summary: Your instinct is to imagine the unconventional option first, then apply structure — that ordering is what tends to set your work apart.

growthArchitect.title: Growth Architect
growthArchitect.description: You're drawn to finding the mechanisms that make a business compound, not just start.
growthArchitect.summary: You naturally look past the launch toward what makes something scale — the channel, the loop, the second and third order effect.

executionSpecialist.title: Execution Specialist
executionSpecialist.description: You're most energized by shipping — turning a plan into something real, fast.
executionSpecialist.summary: Where others deliberate, you tend to move — your strength is closing the gap between a decision and a finished result.

dnaProfile.sectionSubtitle: How your answers map across all seven founder archetypes.

builder.name: The Builder
builder.description: Drawn to shipping tangible things and iterating in public.

visionary.name: The Visionary
visionary.description: Sees where a market is headed before it gets there.

operator.name: The Operator
operator.description: Turns messy processes into repeatable systems.

creator.name: The Creator
creator.description: Leads with original ideas, content, and craft.

seller.name: The Seller
seller.description: Energized by pitching, negotiating, and closing.

leader.name: The Leader
leader.description: Rallies people around a shared goal.

analyst.name: The Analyst
analyst.description: Grounds decisions in data before committing.

items.strategicVision: Strategic vision — you naturally think several moves ahead.
items.adaptability: Adaptability — you adjust quickly when plans change.
items.riskAppetite: Risk appetite — uncertainty doesn't stop you from moving.
items.clearCommunication: Clear communication — you make complex ideas easy to follow.
items.fastLearning: Fast learning — you pick up new domains quickly.

items.delegation: Delegation — handing off ownership instead of holding on to everything.
items.financialDiscipline: Financial discipline — tighter tracking of budget and burn.
items.technicalDepth: Technical depth — going deeper on the tools behind the idea.
items.consistentExecution: Consistent execution — following through past the first burst of energy.
items.networkBuilding: Network building — investing in relationships before you need them.

workStyle.sectionSubtitle: How you tend to operate day-to-day.

risk.label: Risk Tolerance
risk.description: How comfortable you are making decisions without full certainty.

leadership.label: Leadership
leadership.description: How naturally you take charge and direct others.

communicationStyle.label: Communication
communicationStyle.description: How you prefer to explain ideas and give feedback.

technicalAbility.label: Technical Ability
technicalAbility.description: Your comfort working directly with technical tools and systems.

creativity.label: Creativity
creativity.description: How often you default to a novel approach over a proven one.

automationAffinity.label: Automation Affinity
automationAffinity.description: How much you lean on tools and automation instead of manual effort.

businessExperience.label: Business Experience
businessExperience.description: How much hands-on experience you bring from prior ventures or roles.

timeAvailability.label: Time Availability
timeAvailability.description: How many hours a week you can realistically commit right now.

opportunities.sectionSubtitle: A first look at the kinds of businesses that could fit your profile.
opportunities.disclaimer: Illustrative example — your real matches are calculated once your assessment is fully processed.

sample1.name: Local Service Marketplace App
sample1.description: Illustrative example — connects nearby customers with independent service providers.

sample2.name: Niche Subscription Box
sample2.description: Illustrative example — a recurring-revenue product curated for a specific audience.

sample3.name: B2B Workflow SaaS Tool
sample3.description: Illustrative example — software that automates a repetitive task for other businesses.

whyTheseMatches.body: These placeholder examples were chosen to illustrate how compatibility, difficulty, and scalability will be presented once real matching is in place.

reasons.reason1: Your DNA profile leans toward vision and creativity, which tends to fit fast-moving, idea-driven businesses.
reasons.reason2: Your work style shows solid risk tolerance, which opens the door to less conventional business models.
reasons.reason3: Your available time and business experience shape how ambitious a starting point makes sense.

thinking.subtext: This usually takes about twenty seconds.

aboutYou.title: About you
aboutYou.description: The basics — so we can ground everything else in your real situation.

financialSituation.title: Financial situation
financialSituation.description: What you have to invest, and what you need to earn.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: How you think, decide and work best.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Rate your comfort across ten common founder skills.

lifestyle.title: Lifestyle
lifestyle.description: The shape of the working life you actually want.

risk.title: Risk
risk.description: How much uncertainty you can comfortably carry.

interests.title: Interests
interests.description: What draws you in — and what you'd rather avoid.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Where this is all headed, in your own words.

country.label: Which country are you based in?

weeklyAvailability.label: How many hours a week could you realistically give this?

incomeUrgency.label: How urgently do you need this to replace your income?

options.low: Not urgent — I can be patient
options.moderate: Somewhat — I'd like traction within a year
options.high: Fairly urgent — within a few months

budget.label: How much could you invest to get started?

targetMonthlyIncome.label: What monthly income would make this feel worth it?

desiredTimeline.label: How soon would you like to see real traction?

decisionMaking.label: How do you usually make important decisions?

options.collaborative: I talk it through with others
options.decisive: I decide fast and adjust later

sellingPreference.label: How comfortable are you selling to people directly?

leadership.label: How comfortable are you leading and directing others?

problemSolving.label: How much do you enjoy solving messy, undefined problems?

creativity.label: How creative would you say you are?

structureVsFlexibility.label: Where do you sit between structure and flexibility?
structureVsFlexibility.description: 0 means you crave structure and routine, 100 means you thrive on flexibility and change.

remote.label: Where would you like to work from?

travel.label: How much travel would you be comfortable with?

employees.label: Do you want to manage a team?

options.soloOnly: Just me, at least at first

freedom.label: How much day-to-day freedom do you need?

workingHours.label: How many hours a week do you want to work, long-term?

b2bVsB2c.label: Who would you rather sell to?

riskTolerance.label: How much financial risk are you willing to take on?

failureTolerance.label: How would a failed first attempt affect you?
failureTolerance.description: 1 means it would be very discouraging, 5 means you'd see it as part of the process.

investmentConfidence.label: How confident are you investing your own money into this?

businessModels.label: Which of these business models appeal to you?

topics.label: Anything else you're drawn to that we haven't covered?

neverDo.label: Is there anything you'd never want your day-to-day work to involve?

fiveYearVision.label: Where do you want this to have taken you in five years?

definitionOfSuccess.label: What would make this feel like a success to you, personally?
